title: Accolades for Hoekwil Primary's exceptional systemic results
description: GEORGE NEWS - Hoekwil Primary School is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Hoekwil Primary School is proud to announce its exceptional performance in the recent systemic results for the 2024 classes.


> The Grade 3 class has achieved first place in Circuit 3 competing against 28 schools - a truly remarkable accomplishment.


Additionally, the Grade 6 class secured an impressive third place, further highlighting the dedication and excellence of the school's learners and educators.


> Principal Flippie Grobbelaar extended his heartfelt congratulations to the school's dedicated teachers for their commitment and hard work in preparing students for success.


"Their passion and dedication continue to make a significant impact on our learners' academic journeys, and these results are a testament to their efforts," he said.

From left are Rozanne Swart (Grade 5 - 7), Dina Lourens (Grade 5 - 7) and Mayley Evason (assistant).


> Grobbelaar also praised the learners for their perseverance and hard work.


"Your success is a reflection of your dedication and determination, and we celebrate each and every one of you."

Parents and guardians were also acknowledged for their support and encouragement, which play a crucial role in fostering a love for learning and helping students reach their full potential.

Hoekwil Primary's team of teachers.

‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’
